question: Find the number of pets for each student who has any pet and student id.
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) ,  T1.stuid FROM student AS T1 JOIN has_pet AS T2 ON T1.stuid  =  T2.stuid GROUP BY T1.stuid
predicted_sql: SELECT stui, count(*) FROM has_pet GROUP BY stui;
raw_response: SELECT stui, count(*) FROM has_pet GROUP BY stui;
